title: Additive Hybrid Score: ML Prediction + Rule-Based Gate Threshold
summary: The ArXiv 2025 paper on hybrid AI trading (2601.19504) achieved a 61.5% win rate (vs 53.4% baseline) by combining an XGBoost classifier prediction with additive rule-based confirmation gates, requiring a composite score ≥ 2 before entry. Each confirmation layer adds +1 to a running tally: ML prediction = buy (+1), price > EMA50 AND MACD crossover (+1), RSI < 30 (+1). Trade only executes if total ≥ 2. This prevents the ML model from firing alone on low-confidence predictions and prevents rule-based signals from firing in isolation when the ML model disagrees. Decifer already has a 9-dimension composite score; integrating a binary ML prediction (+1 if P(win) > 0.55, else 0) as an additional gate creates this multi-modal confirmation structure without requiring full architectural changes.
research_topic: Win Rate Improvement — ML Feature Engineering & Predictive Signal Construction
expected_impact: +4–6% win rate via reduced false positives
deferral_reason: not in paper_trading_single_account Active pipeline — deferred for future stage review
